title: × Asplenosorus castaneoviridis
taxonomy: × Asplenosorus castaneoviridis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on trees and other surfaces. This species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The exact classification of × Asplenosorus castaneoviridis is as a nothospecies, a hybrid of Asplenium and Sorus. Further study is required to determine the exact classification and relationships of this species within the fern family.
